blended.narrative: Showdown Montana is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,682 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 8.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 44".
